title: Reserve Bank of India imposes monetary penalty on Canara Bank
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated June 5, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹41.80 lakh (Rupees Forty one lakh eighty thousand only) on Canara Bank (the bank) for non-compliance with certain provisions of directions issued by RBI on ‘Know Your Customer (KYC)’ and ‘Unclaimed Deposits / Inoperative Accounts in banks’. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under the provisions of section 47A(1)(c) read with sections
